companion_warrior.name: Gareth the Ironclad
companion_warrior.description: A battle-hardened warrior who fights at the front line, boosting your attack and drawing enemy aggression.

companion_mage.name: Seraphine the Arcane
companion_mage.description: A master of the arcane arts who significantly boosts MP and spell power, restoring mana each turn.

companion_rogue.name: Nyx the Shadow
companion_rogue.description: A silent killer who increases your critical strike chance and deals devastating damage from the shadows.

companion_hunter.name: Lyra the Swift
companion_hunter.description: A nimble hunter who reads the land and increases your speed and critical hit chance in combat.

companion_bard.name: Fenwick the Ironvoice
companion_bard.description: A travelling bard whose battle-songs inspire the party, granting party-wide attack and defense bonuses.

companion_paladin.name: Sir Aldric the Just
companion_paladin.description: A noble paladin who shields allies with divine grace, combining strong defense with retributive holy power.

companion_druid.name: Kaelen of the Wild
companion_druid.description: A wild druid who channels the power of nature, entangling enemies and bolstering your magical reserves.

companion_priest.name: Sister Astra the Lifegiver
companion_priest.description: A devoted priest whose divine aura restores HP after each battle and provides significant healing to keep the party alive.
